_comment: Synthetic BTC tx graph chaining TWO real OFAC SDN DPRK-linked mixers: Blender.io (bc1q2sttgr0vd4r88uxq7feu5g0r8z7q3qkq0r6yqr, DPRK3, listed 2022-05-06) and its successor Sinbad.io (bc1qs4dqj3x3pqr0z5fpmldtq3z0d6q5w2x5lj7qk0, DPRK3, listed 2023-11-29). Funds exit Blender.io, pass an intermediate hop, enter Sinbad.io, then split to two payout wallets. Both mixer addresses are real SDN entries; all others are fictional placeholders.
